class.name: saye_nav2_plugins/HybridAStarPlanner
class.description: Hybrid A* global planner with Reeds-Shepp motion primitives and quintic polynomial smoothing

class.name: saye_nav2_plugins/MPCController
class.description: Model Predictive Controller using linearized kinematic bicycle model and OSQP QP solver

class.name: saye_nav2_plugins/PurePursuitController
class.description: Classic Pure Pursuit geometric path tracker

class.name: saye_nav2_plugins/StanleyController
class.description: Stanley controller combining heading error and cross-track error
